overview: Converts segmented text units (paragraphs) into multiple text units, one per aligned sentence pair, for each target locale. This is useful for steps like the Diff Leverage Step that require un-segmented text units. Text units that reference other `IResource` objects or serve as referents are passed through unchanged.
limitations: Using this step may prevent merging, so it should only be used in pipelines that do **not** require translated translation kits to be merged.
Text units that reference or are referents of other `IResource` objects are passed through as-is, even if they contain segments.
processingNotes: Each segmented text unit is split into multiple text units with single segments, one per aligned sentence pair.
The conversion is performed for **all target locales** present in the text unit.

examples.title: Use with Diff Leverage Step
examples.description: The primary use case is to prepare segmented content for steps that require un-segmented text units. Place this step **before** the Diff Leverage Step in the pipeline to convert paragraph-level text units into sentence-level text units.
